name: ne-claude-plugins
description: NextEra Labs Claude Plugin Marketplace — curated plugins for development workflows, integrations, and productivity

plugins.name: codesmith
plugins.description: Modular development workflow — orchestrated spec refinement, TDD, multi-agent review, pluggable ticket system integration, and CLAUDE.md scaffolding

plugins.name: code-audit
plugins.description: Multi-agent code review — parallel security and logic analysis with confidence-scored findings

plugins.name: secret-guard
plugins.description: Pre-commit guard — scans staged files for leaked secrets before committing

plugins.name: obsidian-vault
plugins.description: MCP server for reading and writing Obsidian vault notes from Claude Code

plugins.name: discord-notify
plugins.description: Send messages to Discord channels via bot API with guided setup

plugins.name: drawio
plugins.description: Create and edit draw.io diagrams directly from Claude Code — flowcharts, architecture diagrams, sequence diagrams, and more

plugins.name: skillforge
plugins.description: Autonomous skill optimizer — parallel execution, blind grading, checkpoint/resume, and eval discriminability checks. Based on Karpathy's autoresearch methodology.
